_howto: Each preset turns a saved Show Finder filter into a Kometa collection YAML
at exports/kometa/finder-<slug>.yml, regenerated by the data refresh.
To create one: open https://shevato.com/apps/rising-seasons/, switch to
Show Finder, dial in your filters, then copy everything after `#` in the
summary  - collection summary shown in Plex
query    - the Finder URL hash (filters + sort), verbatim
limit    - cap on emitted shows (top N by the query's sort). Keeps a
loose filter from producing an unmanageably large
template - optional { name, file|url|git|repo }: emitted as a Kometa
external_templates reference so the consuming instance can
layer its own collection attributes (labels, schedules,
visibility, ...) on top of the generated list.

presets.name: Consistently Great
presets.summary: Highly-rated live-action shows whose seasons never wavered - from the Rising Seasons Show Finder.

presets.name: Went Out On Top
presets.summary: Shows that saved their best season for last - no limp endings here. From the Rising Seasons Show Finder.

presets.name: Better Than You Heard
presets.summary: Shows whose episodes rate well above the show's own IMDb score - the audience that stayed loved what it found. From the Rising Seasons Show Finder.

presets.name: Marathon Material
presets.summary: 100+ episodes and still rated 7.5 or better - shows you can live in for months. From the Rising Seasons Show Finder.

presets.name: Modern Prestige
presets.summary: The defining shows of the last few years - 2018 onward, huge audiences, top-shelf ratings. From the Rising Seasons Show Finder.
